expectations.evidence: await fetch('/auth/login', { method: 'POST', ... }) — uses /auth/login, missing the /api/v1 prefix

expectations.text: Recommends access_token in memory (not localStorage) for security
expectations.evidence: localStorage.setItem('access_token', data.access_token); — the implementation stores access_token in localStorage despite a vague note about preferring HttpOnly cookies
if (error.response?.status === 401 && !orig._retry) { orig._retry = true; ... const { data } = await axios.post('/auth/refresh', ...); ... return api(orig); }
No mention of WINEMAKER or ADMIN roles anywhere in the response.

expectations.text: References GET /api/v1/auth/me for loading user context
